title: Remove Enum.find on a large list, use a Map lookup
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/departments_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.DepartmentsLive). Its mount/3 must receive a departments list and pre-compute a Map keyed by id via Map.new(departments, &{&1.id, &1}), assigning the map as :departments_by_id. handle_event("pick", %{"id" => id}, socket) must look up via Map.fetch!(socket.assigns.departments_by_id, id) — NOT via Enum.find. mount/3 can start with departments = [].
tier_rationale: Well-known performance anti-pattern with a canonical Map-indexed replacement.
research_citation: John Elm Labs anti-patterns: 'Indexing: Not Just For the Database'
